specializations: Trace element delivery systems for skin
product_highlights: PHYSIOGENYL® - physiological oligo-mineral catalyst providing skin energy and hydration
Unique mineral carrier system delivering trace elements to skin cells
Clinically validated for skin energy enhancement and hydration
COSMOS-compatible formulation for natural and organic cosmetics
notes: Solabia Group is a French biotech company producing PHYSIOGENYL®, a unique physiological oligo-mineral catalyst that functions as a mineral carrier system for the skin. PHYSIOGENYL® delivers essential trace elements to skin cells, providing energy and hydration benefits through a carrier mechanism analogous to carrier peptides. Solabia's broad portfolio of biotech-derived cosmetic actives is COSMOS-compatible and widely used in premium European skincare formulations.
